Ropes.info: An interactive & Procedural Rope Simulation environment written from scratch in JS using the integration formulae and some math.

Falling Sand.info: A Falling Sand Simulation written in pure JS. Inspired by a Coding Train Challenge video, it features more than 50 materials with unique interactions, a controllable character that shoots materials as projectiles and much more

Logic Gates.info: Create, connect and update logic / audio nodes in order to simulate the inner workings of a computer, or make music in the most convoluted way immaginable.

Marbles.info: A simple physics engine revolving around marbles. Move them around and relax
